column2: Benda‘sches Konservatorium der Musik und musikpädagogisches Seminar

column21: Location now in the middle of Franz-Kluhs-Straße.
Merges into the Ochs-Eichelberg-Konservatorium in May 1911 (see source 1911). The name Ochs'sche Konservatorium is still used in 1914, though.

In 1909, at the same address there is the Musik-Bildungsanstalt.
